title: Crafted Currency
description: Turn your Minecraft ore's into crisp stacks of 💵 cash! This fun and lightweight texture pack swaps out emeralds, diamond and gold for realistic money 💸- perfect for economy servers, roleplay 🏦, or just flexing your wealth in style 😎.
body:
💵 **Crafted Currency** – *Turn your treasures into tender!* 💎💰
Say goodbye to shiny ores and hello to stacks of cash! Crafted Currency replaces **Netherite, Emeralds, Diamonds, Gold, and Copper** with custom-designed **money notes and currency blocks** that give your Minecraft world an economic glow-up.

Whether you’re running a roleplay city, an economy survival server, or just love showing off your fortune, this pack brings a rich, stylish twist to your gameplay.

---

### 🔹 **Features:**

* 💷 Netherite → Cool Netherite Note
* 💎 Diamonds → Cool Blue Diamond Bills
* 💵 Emeralds → Green Cash Notes
* 🪙 Gold → Sleek Golden Notes
* 🪫 Copper → Rust Bill
* ⚙️ Perfect for shops, vaults, and economy plugins
* 🧩 Lightweight and compatible with most packs

💼 Trade smart. Store rich. **Craft your currency.**
